description: Create a two-column content slide on Haiti debt sustainability analysis with multiple reference tables and a highlighted threshold comparison layout.

header.headline: Table 1. Haiti: Debt Carrying Capacity and Thresholds

items.sub: WCI 2.64; current vintage Medium (2.75); previous vintage Medium (2.81); two previous vintages Medium

CPIA 0.38 x 2.687 = 1.03 (39%); Real growth rate 2.719 x -0.084 = 0.00 (0%); Import coverage of reserves 4.052 x 40.451 = 1.64 (62%); Import coverage of reserves^2 -3.960 x 16.363 = -0.65 (-25%); Remittances 2.022 x 11.748 = 0.24 (9%); World economic growth 13.520 x 2.856 = 0.39 (15%); CI Score 2.84; CI rating Weak
PV of debt in % of GDP: 180; Debt service in % of Exports: 40; Debt service in % of Revenue: 15 and 18
PV of total public debt in percent of GDP: 55
Weak: CI < 2.69; Medium: 2.69 ≤ CI ≤ 3.05; Strong: CI > 3.05

External debt burden thresholds — PV of debt in % of Exports: Weak 140, Medium 180, Strong 240; GDP: 30, 40, 55; Debt service in % of Exports: 10, 15, 21; Revenue: 14, 18, 23. Total public debt benchmark — PV of total public debt in percent of GDP: Weak 35, Medium 55, Strong 70
